models.title: Compotite 24in. Tile-in Top Black ABS Linear Drain Cover Plate
source_fields:
• Allows for tile to inlay into the drain body creating a streamlined modern design for your shower floor
  • Reinforced tray fits directly into Compotite Linear Drain Body
  • Tray is removable for easy cleaning of drain body and integrated hair strainer (included)

models.title: 24 Inch Grated Linear Shower Drain
source_fields: Made with high-quality stainless steel, designed to resist corrosion and maintain a sleek look for years.; Features a modern, minimalist design that blends seamlessly with any bathroom decor.; Simple to install with standard fittings, perfect for both new builds and renovations; Built to withstand daily use while maintaining a secure, watertight seal.; The robust drain system ensures quick drainage, preventing water pooling and ensuring a dry, clean shower floor; Tapered bottom outlet with removable trough; Features adjustable feet for easy leveling; If using rubber memrane, must use PVC drain flange coupling (sold seperately); The smooth surface and minimal design make it easy to clean and maintain, keeping your shower looking fresh; Engineered to handle high water flow, minimizing the risk of clogs and ensuring fast drainage; Designed with a secure seal that helps prevent leaks, protecting your shower area from water damage; Offers a polished, professional finish that enhances the look of any modern bathroom; A durable, high-performance solution that will add lasting value and functionality to your bathroom for years to come; Features a perforated strainer for efficient water drainage and debris collection; The corrosion-resistant stainless steel material ensures the drain maintains its appearance over time.; Designed for easy upkeep with a smooth surface that resists dirt and grime buildup.; Constructed from 18-gauge stainless steel for durability; Removable grate for easy cleaning and hair removal; Eligible for Free Shipping on orders $99+; Important: Item must be inspected within 48 hours of receipt
